violations.text: The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live insects observed during inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023
Door handle for walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live insects observed during inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Bags of ice were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
Door handle for walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
FRP under prep area observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer, prep tables, tables, interior of prep unit, and handsinks have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Prep sink faucet observed leaking. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Refuse area observed with trash and litter. Refuse area to be maintained clean and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The floors and walls in the warewashing area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The drains throughout the establishment have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Walk-in cooler door was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sinks at the prep area and near dishmachine. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
The hand-washing sink near the prep area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023

Alcohol, single service items, juices, and equipment were stored in the women's restroom. Food may not be stored in toilet rooms to prevent sources of contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
Handle to walk-in refrigerator was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
Chemical dispenser for sanitizing chemical at 3 bay sink was not dispensing at proper concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023

Wood is used in the construction of the storage shelf in warewashing area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink and dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
Plumbing at 3 bay sink was observed leaking into a bus bucket. Plumbing systems to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
Light bulb underneath hood was observed burnt out. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
